title: GSR No. 2041 (E) dated 30.08.2012-Re-constitution of Committee comprising of members for the purpose of control and supervision of experiments on animals.

Special Secretary / Additional Secretary, Incharge of Animal Welfare, Government of India, Ministry of Environment and Forests, New Delhi. Joint Secretary (Animal Welfare), Ministry of Environment and Forests, New Delhi. Dr. A.J. Rao Prof. Rajarammanna Fellow DST, Indian Institute of Science Bangalore-560 012 Dr. Sangeeta Sharma Secretary, Medical Council of India (MCI), New Delhi. Dr. D. Swarup, Director, Central Institute for Research on Goats (CIRG), Makhdoom, Farah, Mathura, UP, India 281122. Dr. K. Nachimuthu, Ex-Director of Research, Tamilnadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS), No.4, Dhamodara Street, Panchvadi, Chetpet, Chennai-600 031. Dr. Kondavalla Venkaiah, Head & Addl. Director, Bio-Statistics Department, National Institute of Nutrition, Hyderabad. ProfP.B.Seshagiri, Department of Molecular Reproduction, Development & Genetics, Indian Institute of Science, 560012, Bangalore. Dr. Shashi Motilal, Professor (Philosophy), University of Delhi, 15, Taxila Apartment, IIT/Delhi, Hauz Khas, New Delhi Dr. S. Chinny Krishna, 398, TTK Road, Chennai - 600 Chairperson / Member Vice Chairperson / Member Member Member Member Member Member Member Member Member -- 4 of 6 -- [?PT II—TsPZ 3(H)] *ITOT ^T TF3TT3 : 3 W W I 5 11. 12. 13. 14. 15. 16. 17. 18. Ms. Norma Alvarez, People for Animal Goa, G-8, St. Britto's Apts. Ferra Alta, MapusaGoa-403507 Dr. Shiranee Pereira, Senior Scientist, Central Institute of Brackish Water Aqua Culture, 75, Santhome High Road, R.A. Puram, Chennai-600028 Dr. Subeer S. Majumdar Staff Scientist VI National Institute of Immunology, Aruna Asaf Ali Marg, New Delhi Prof. (Dr.) B. Suresh, President, Pharmacy Council of India (PCI) & Vice Chancellor, J.S.S. University, Sri Shivarathresshwara Nagar, Mysore - 570015 (Karnataka) Representative from Wild Life Institute of India (WII) Chairman, Animal Welfare Board of India (AWBI), Chennai Director, National Institute of Animal Welfare (NIAW), Ballabhgarh Director(Animal Welfare), Ministry of Environment and Forests, New Delhi Member Member Member Member Member Member Member Member Secretary 2. The Central Government hereby nominates Additional Secretary, incharge of Animal Welfare, Ministry of Environment and Forests and Member to be the Chairperson of the Committee as per sub-section (2) of section 15 of the said Act. 3. Joint Secretary (Animal welfare), Ministry of Environment and Forests and Member will be Vice Chairperson of the Committee. 4. The term of the Committee shall, unless sooner dissolved, be three years from the date of its constitution. -- 5 of 6 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 5. The Committee constituted earlier vide Gazette Notification No. S.0.32 (E) dated 10 January, 2003 amended subsequently vide Notification Numbers. S.0.599 (E) dated 26.05.2003; S.0.955 (E) dated 21.08.2003; S.0.69 (E) dated 15.01.2004; S.0.85(E) dated 25.01.2005; 8.0.1491(E) dated 17.10.2005; S.0.933(E) dated 21.06.2006; 8.0.1817(E) dated 19.10.2006; 8.0.1328(E) dated 07.06.2010 and 8.0.2778(E) dated 10.11.2010 stands dissolved from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. [F. "No. 25/34/2010-AWD (PL)] ANJANI KUMAR, Director (AW) Note : The earlier notification constituting the Committee for the purpose of Control and Supervision of Experiments on Animals was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide No. S.0.32 (E) dated 10th January, 2003 and was subsequently amended vide Notification Numbers. S.0.599 (E) dated 26.05.2003; S.0.955(E) dated 21.08.2003; S.0.69(E) dated 15.01.2004; S.0.85(E) dated 25.01.2005; S.0.1491(E) dated 17.10.2005; S.0.933(E) dated 21.06.2006; S.0.1817(E) dated 19.10.2006; S.0.1328(E) dated 07.06.2010 and S.0.2778(E) dated 10.11.2010 Primed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 6 of 6 --
